title: Gooey Tangy Meditteranean Cabbage Stir-fry
description: An indulgent mediterranean dish featuring hispi sweetheart cabbage, stuffed with tangy flavors and served as a satisfying side or light meal.

ingredients.name: dum
ingredients.amount: 2 tbsp (or less to suit taste) - for the tangy filling

instructions: In a bowl, mix hispi sweet cabbage with dum and some olive oil. Season lightly with salt.
Arrange the seasoned cabbage mixture in a greased pan. Drizzle over a little bit of fodmap-friendly tamari sauce for glazing and seasoning.
While the cabbage is baking, make your tangy filling by mixing dum, 1 tbsp of olive oil, and a drizzle of fodmap-friendly tamari sauce. Adjust to taste with salt if needed.
After the dish is done, transfer it from oven to a serving plate. Top each slice with its own tangy filling.
For an extra indulgence, sprinkle fresh dill on top before serving.
